source_text: 📻Well done mate, that's a really phenomenal drive, great drive! Really good job Oscar, that's exactly what we were looking for. 🐝Yeah that was a bit better than last race, nice. Good job everybody, that was a tough afternoon, I've still got a bit of pace to make up but thanks guys for all the effort the last couple of weeks. I think that is pretty good evidence that it's paid off. So thank you, let's do that every time~Thank you~

source_text: The FIA’s thoughts are with Harald, a marshal at the Austrian Grand Prix, who suffered a heart emergency before Sunday’s race. He was airlifted to a nearby hospital, where he received medical treatment. We wish Harald a full and speedy recovery, extend our best wishes to his family and loved ones, and thank him for his dedication and commitment to our sport.
current_zh: The FIA’s thoughts are with Harald, a marshal at the Austrian Grand Prix, who suffered a heart emergency before Sunday’s race. He was airlifted to a nearby hospital, where he received medical treatment. We wish Harald a full and speedy recovery, extend our best wishes to his family and loved ones, and thank him for his dedication and commitment to our sport.
